A.text: Two pentagons share a common edge.

B.text: No two hexagons share a common edge.

C.text: Each pentagon is adjacent only to hexagons.

D.text: Each hexagon is adjacent only to pentagons.

parsed.answer_value: Two pentagons share a common edge.
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows a structure where two pentagons are connected by a common edge, which is a characteristic of certain molecular structures like buckminsterfullerene.
